name: the cfpb-consumerfinance default entry carries source_class federal-financial-regulator at tier 1 applied to react and node
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/list-default-sources.sh" --id cfpb-consumerfinance 2>out.txt && grep -q 'source_class=federal-financial-regulator' out.txt && grep -q 'tier=1' out.txt && grep -q 'applies_to=.*react' out.txt && grep -q 'applies_to=.*node' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
